channel.title: Flarestamina — IELTS News & Deadlines
channel.description: IELTS exam updates, fees and scholarship deadlines for students in Uzbekistan. Every post cites its official source.

item.title: Multilevel (CEFR): the national exam that equals IELTS at DTM — and costs far less
item.description: Uzbekistan's national Multilevel exam issues CEFR-level certificates (B1/B2/C1). At DTM a Multilevel B2 has the same power as IELTS 5.5+: the maximum foreign-language score.

item.title: QS 2027 rankings are out — check your university before the next El-Yurt Umidi call
item.description: The QS World University Rankings 2027 edition was released in June. El-Yurt Umidi funds top-ranked universities, so your target's new position decides your eligibility.

item.title: IELTS Speaking topics rotate in September — use the current bank while it lasts
item.description: The IELTS Speaking question pool partially refreshes roughly every four months — January, May and September. What that means if your exam is in August vs October.

item.title: Computer IELTS results arrive in 1–5 days — paper takes about 13
item.description: Official timelines: computer-delivered IELTS results are released in 1–5 days, paper-based in about 13 days. Why that gap decides which format deadline-chasers should book.

item.title: IELTS UKVI vs Academic — the expensive mix-up UK applicants keep making
item.description: IELTS for UKVI is the same test with extra government approval — but booking the wrong one can cost you a full retake. Who actually needs UKVI and who doesn't.

item.title: DAAD 2027: Germany's funded master's — most EPOS deadlines fall between August and December
item.description: DAAD's EPOS scholarships fund development-related master's degrees in Germany: monthly stipend, insurance, travel. Each programme sets its own deadline — most land Aug–Dec 2026 for a 2027 start.

item.title: Chinese Government Scholarship 2027 — the window usually opens in winter
item.description: The CSC scholarship covers tuition, dormitory and a monthly stipend at Chinese universities. Applications for the 2027 intake typically run from late 2026 to spring 2027.

item.title: Duolingo English Test: 5,500+ institutions accept it — but know its limits
item.description: The DET costs a fraction of IELTS, takes about an hour and is taken at home. Thousands of universities accept it — but UK visa routes and many scholarships still want IELTS.

item.title: EducationUSA Tashkent: free, official help for US university applications
item.description: The US State Department's advising network has a Tashkent office: free advising sessions, application guidance, and the Opportunity Funds programme for high-potential, low-income students.

item.title: Free official IELTS prep — straight from the test makers
item.description: Before paying for another course: the British Council and IDP publish serious free preparation — structured courses, sample papers and band-scored writing answers.

item.title: Your IELTS expires in 2 years — plan backwards from the application, not the exam
item.description: An IELTS Test Report Form is valid for two years. Take it too early and it dies before your application; too late and results won't arrive. The backwards-planning method.

item.title: IELTS 5.5+ gives you the maximum foreign-language score at DTM — the 2026 rules
item.description: A valid B2 certificate (IELTS 5.5+) replaces the entrance-exam foreign-language section with the maximum score: 93.0 as first subject, 63.0 as second. New for 2026: B1 gives 75%.

item.title: GKS 2027: Korea's fully funded scholarship opens in September — embassy track first
item.description: Full tuition, ₩1M+ monthly stipend, flights and a year of Korean. Embassy track ~September 2026, university track ~October — one track per cycle.

item.title: Türkiye Bursları 2027 expected in January — one window, don't miss it
item.description: One application period per year for all levels; the 2026 window was 10 January – 20 February. Tuition, dorm, stipend, flights and university placement included.

item.title: Erasmus Mundus 2027: fully funded master's across Europe — deadlines start this autumn
item.description: Study in 2–3 European countries on one EU scholarship. Programmes open October–December 2026; most deadlines fall November–February.

item.title: Chevening 2027/28 opens in August — deadline is 6 October 2026
item.description: The UK's fully funded master's scholarship returns. Uzbekistan is eligible. Timeline and preparation checklist before applications open in August 2026.

item.title: IELTS One Skill Retake is live in Uzbekistan — retake one skill, keep the rest
item.description: Retake only Listening, Reading, Writing or Speaking within 60 days of your test — without redoing the whole exam. Rules, booking and who accepts it.

item.title: Stipendium Hungaricum 2027/28 opens around November — prepare now
item.description: Hungary's fully funded scholarship opens mid-November and closes mid-January, every year. What Uzbek applicants should prepare during summer and autumn.

item.title: El-Yurt Umidi 2026: 500 quotas in the first call — how to be ready for the next one
item.description: The first 2026 open call closed in April with 500 quotas across bachelor's, master's and PhD. What the numbers say and what to prepare before the next call.

item.title: How much does IELTS cost in Uzbekistan in 2026?
item.description: Current test fees at IDP and the British Council, what the price includes, how to pay — and how not to waste a second attempt fee.
